message:
feat: safe memmap, complex linalg, RNG witness tests, polynomial conformance

- Replace OS-level mmap (unsafe) with safe file-backed Vec<u8> buffer in fnp-io
  memmap implementation (14 new tests, 136 total)
- Add complex-valued linalg operations: solve, det, inv, cholesky (Hermitian),
  QR (Householder), matmul, conjugate transpose, trace, Frobenius norm
  (17 new tests, 181 total)
- Add deterministic sequence witness tests for all 41 RNG distribution
  functions with seed=12345, locking exact output values for regression
  detection (5 new tests covering continuous, discrete, and multivariate)
- Expand polynomial conformance fixtures from 48 to 76 cases covering
  chebder/int, legder/int/fit, hermder/int, lagder/int, and all
  probabilist Hermite operations

Closes: bd-dqku.4, bd-dqku (epic)
Progress: bd-16mu.5 (complex linalg core complete)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
